text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The right to compete in the Arima Kinen is
decided by the popular vote of racing fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her accomplishments in the Classics,
Mejiro Ryan has earned enough votes to take
part in the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Senior-year Umamusume, including the "Beast,"
Oguri Cap, will also be competing in the
illustrious race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intimidated by all the extraordinary entrants she
will be facing, Mejiro Ryan heads off to the race.
